data.title: BNB Chain Announces 10 Winning Projects in the First Week of Meme Token Liquidity Support Program
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain has announced the first week winners of its $4.4 million Meme token liquidity support program, with a total of 10 projects winning: Broccoli (f3b), KOMA, SIREN, BANANA, PERRY, TST, 4, Broccoli (714), Broccoli (f2b), TUT.
BNB Chain said that the daily rewards have been distributed and the weekly winners' rewards will be issued within 10 days. The final ranking has eliminated the volume-washing behavior found in the trading competition, and removed projects that did not meet the award benchmark.

data.title: Bitcoin needs ‘key’ $75k support to avoid price drop amid macro concerns
data.description:
Global trade concerns continue pressuring investor sentiment, risking a potential Bitcoin correction below the key $75,000 support level.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-drops-us-china-trade-war-75k-support?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: RED opened at 0.4 USDT on Binance Pre-Market, hitting the daily price limit on the first day
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News RedStone (RED) has been opened for trading in the Binance Pre-Market, currently quoted at 0.4 USDT, up 100%, hitting the daily limit on the first day.
Earlier news, Binance Pre-Market launched a daily limit mechanism. The daily limit mechanism will limit the highest trading price in the first 72 hours of the pre-market, and the token price increase must not exceed a certain percentage of the initial opening price. After 72 hours of the pre-market opening, there will be no price limit and trading will return to normal.
Currently, this mechanism only applies to RED, and the daily limit limits for the first three days are 200%, 300%, and 400% of the opening price respectively.

data.title: Arizona Senate Advances Cryptocurrency Reserve Bills
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Arizona Senate has passed two cryptocurrency reserve bills, moving them closer to becoming law. These bills have now been forwarded to the state's House of Representatives for further consideration.

data.title: A whale spent $17.54 million to buy 8,186.27 ETH 6 hours ago and transferred it to another wallet
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that 6 hours ago, a whale spent $17.54 million in DAI and USDT to buy 8,186.27 ETH at an average price of $2,144, and later transferred it to another wallet.

data.title: Space and Time (SXT) is now available on Gate.io’s pre-market OTC trading platform
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io pre-market OTC trading has officially launched Space and Time (SXT) at 17:00 (UTC+8) on February 28, 2025, providing users with a convenient channel to participate in the Space and Time ecosystem. It is reported that Space and Time is a Web3 native decentralized data platform that supports low-latency queries and tamper-proof analysis across Web3, and is committed to providing blockchain security and enterprise-level data processing for decentralized applications.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF Influenced By Global Liquidity And Economic Conditions
data.description:
According to PANews, Matrixport's latest weekly report highlights that Bitcoin ETFs are increasingly affected by global liquidity, macroeconomic conditions, central bank policies, and institutional capital flows as Wall Street fully embraces Bitcoin. The strengthening U.S. dollar has led to a decline in this liquidity indicator, suggesting potential downward pressure on Bitcoin prices. Global liquidity peaked at the end of December 2024, and the significant strengthening of the dollar provides a clear explanation for Bitcoin's continued pullback. Looking ahead, the forward-looking characteristics of this time series indicate that once this pullback ends, possibly lasting until March or April, Bitcoin may attempt to return to its previous highs.

Wall Street investors entering the Bitcoin market are categorized into two groups. The first group consists of wealth and asset managers, likely representing wallets holding 100-1000 Bitcoins. This group has become the largest Bitcoin holders, surpassing the previously dominant whale wallets. The second group comprises hedge funds that focus on non-directional returns through arbitrage strategies rather than betting on the long-term rise of Bitcoin prices. When crypto traders are bullish, they typically use futures positions to drive up funding rates, providing arbitrage opportunities for hedge funds. These funds short Bitcoin futures while buying Bitcoin spot or Bitcoin ETFs, earning profits through the funding rate differential.

These hedge funds collectively hold $10 billion in Bitcoin ETFs, with total inflows reaching $39 billion, indicating that at least 25% of Bitcoin ETF funds are related to arbitrage trading. According to calculations, 55% or more of ETF fund inflows may originate from hedge funds focused on arbitrage rather than investors genuinely believing in Bitcoin's long-term growth potential. Since the FOMC meeting in December last year, profit opportunities have significantly decreased, followed by a decline in trading volume. Consequently, it is not surprising that hedge funds have begun unwinding arbitrage positions. This trend is reflected in record outflows from Bitcoin ETFs, as these funds exit trades that are no longer profitable.
